M1-FM-01: ask what are we comparing before the result
sort tasks by length area and amount
use sentence frames naming the attribute
M1-FM-02: require comparison statements to include the attribute word
compare the same objects on different attributes
use visuals that isolate one attribute at a time
M1-FM-03: ask which attribute matters in each case
use pairs where one cue is misleading
M1-FM-04: move from length to area to amount using the same language
ask what stays the same when the attribute changes
